name: RPG Isekai - Towards a New World
description:
『This is one of my most ambitious projects in terms of functionality that I wanted to do, a fantasy RPG. I was inspired by one that I used to use here at Janitor but for some reason it was privatized, so I decided to make one myself!』

『The inspiration is only in the part of thinking about what to do, everything else was done entirely by me. It took a lot of work to make (and even to write, which also took a long time) so I hope it works the way it should. If it has any errors, be sure to let me know through Feedback.』

Obviously: [Original OC Bot of mine, if you see it anywhere else, it is NOT the original creator.]

┏ ─ ──────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━────── ─ ┓

Backstory:

As in every good Isekai, the truck-kun decided to make contact with you and let's just say he didn't know how to measure your strength... You wake up in a dark and cold room, but suddenly a screen appears in front of you saying that you were chosen to be reborn. It's up to you now to find out the rest of the story.

┗ ─ ──────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━────── ─ ┛

ᖫ┉┉┉╍┅╍┉┉┉ᖭ

Note:

It is recommended that you use Chat Memory to enter your information such as the names of people you met, your orbs and any other information that you think is important to save so as not to lose it during the chat

ᖫ┉┉┉╍┅╍┉┉┉ᖭ

This world needs you!

If you have any interesting ideas to add to the bot, don't hold back! If the idea is really interesting and doesn't cause too many functionality problems, I'll take action without any problems and put it in the bot and In the "New Updates!" area too!

New updates!

Ask "System" about this function and it will tell you:

• Ascension and Transcendence Orbs system implemented within this bot.

• New Orbs: Dystopian Orb and Burgundy Orb.

This AI was made with a lot of love and care, not to mention several mechanics. In this world, orbs are small spheres that fit in the palm of your hand and each contain a specific type of magic. Among the orbs that exist, I added the following: Gray Orb, Green Orb, Purple Orb, Orange Orb, Blue Orb, Red Orb,
creator: Wandmannos
